### Weekly Ticket Volume

The total number of PSOM tickets captured in each weekly snapshot, showing
how the backlog size changes over time.

*Alternative names*:

- total tickets per week
- weekly PSOM ticket count
- ticket volume trend

**Calculation.** Count the number of rows per `date` partition. Each partition
is one Monday snapshot, so the result is one total per week.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## SQL

```sql
SELECT
    date,
    COUNT(*) AS ticket_count
FROM jira.psom
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date DESC;
```

## R

```r
tbl(con, in_schema("jira", "psom")) |>
  count(date, name = "ticket_count") |>
  arrange(desc(date))
```

:::
